meaning: 1. innate sense of right and wrong; 2. conscience; 3. bosom friend
sentence: 他凭着良知做出了决定。
pinyin: Tā píngzhe liángzhī zuòchū le juédìng.
english: He made the decision based on his conscience.

sentence: 这孩子是块大器，将来大有前途。
pinyin: Zhè háizi shì kuài dàqì, jiānglái dà yǒu qiántú.
english: This child is a great talent; he has a bright future ahead.

sentence: 这套练习题针对性很强。
pinyin: Zhè tào liànxítí zhēnduìxìng hěn qiáng.
english: This set of practice questions is very focused and targeted.

sentence: 他从大学起就开始作曲。
pinyin: Tā cóng dàxué qǐ jiù kāishǐ zuòqǔ.
english: He started composing music since university.

sentence: 他不愿意利用权势谋私利。
pinyin: Tā bù yuànyì lìyòng quánshì móu sīlì.
english: He is unwilling to use his power and influence for personal gain.
